concerns.text: Tasks T045-T050 (Phase 7) implement Alfvén speed calculations, reference frame tagging, and schematic diagrams. These tasks have no corresponding FR or SC in spec.md. The spec explicitly defers dynamic X-line modeling and limits analysis to linear correlation and the fixed 60 Re heuristic (FR-012, Assumptions). These tasks constitute unauthorized scope creep and leave the implementer without a spec anchor.

Task T020 (US1 Integration) is marked as FAILED/Unfulfilled and explicitly states required files (clean.py, lag.py) are missing. While T005/T006 exist to create these files, T020's status blocks the entire US-1 pipeline. There is no task defined to remediate the 'missing implementation' state of T005/T006 to unblock T020, leaving the core user story (US-1) without a path to completion.

Task T048 requires generating a 'Schematic of Field Line Reconnection' conceptual diagram. Spec FR-008 strictly limits visualizations to (a) scatter plot and (b) dual-axis time-series. This task references a non-existent requirement for a conceptual diagram, creating a stale tag for a feature not in the spec.

Task T049 requires a 'Physical Interpretation' section in the JSON report (Alfvénic Mach number, frame transformations). Spec FR-009 and SC-001 define the JSON schema strictly around correlation stats, p-values, and lag differences. This task references a non-existent requirement for physics-specific report fields.
